title: Return to Sabaody: Key Exchange
description: In the Return to Sabaody storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #6, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #19, Franky as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Return to Sabaody conflict through Unknown person #6, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #19, focusing on the immediate stakes of return to sabaody: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: USOP and Sanji have been here already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Say, did you know about this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: whoahh!! Livin' in Da South Blue Eeeeeee!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Luffy!! I've missed you guys so much!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You must have got really strong...! Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, the thing is, just now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Uh-huh!! It's terrible, luffy!! Robin's in trouble!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah, could be...the resemblance is uncanny.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Like I said, what is this thing..?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Dammit!!! I'm disappointed in you guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Backup should be coming from G1!!

summary: This scene advances the Return to Sabaody conflict through Unknown person #6, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #19, focusing on the immediate stakes of return to sabaody: key exchange.
